tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Total protein and globulin are low, possibly indicating malnutrition or protein loss. Lipid profile reveals elevated triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Liver enzymes and other electrolytes are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function, nutritional status, and cardiovascular risk are recommended.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
